events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 35,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": ["stop-pull", "assess-conduit-run-and-fill", "verify-conduit-bend-radii-and-entry-angles", "recalculate-sidewall-pressure-and-jam-ratio", "correct-routing-or-lubrication-or-pulling-method", "re-pull-with-monitored-tension", "verify-conductor-identification-per-200.6-and-210.5", "inspect-and-test"],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Sidewall pressure exceeded during active wire pull, risking conductor insulation damage at bend points",
    "Jamming condition encountered indicating improper conductor sizing or conduit fill ratio for the bundle configuration",
    "Conductors already pulled under excessive force may have hidden insulation damage requiring inspection or replacement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the pull to prevent further conductor damage",
    "Inspect all conductors already pulled through the affected bends for insulation nicks, deformation, or damage",
    "Recalculate sidewall pressure and jam ratio for the conduit run; verify conduit fill, bend radius, and conductor bundle geometry",
    "Correct the condition by adjusting routing, adding pull points, reducing fill, applying proper pulling lubricant, or using a pulling method that controls tension",
    "Replace any conductors with compromised insulation before proceeding",
    "Verify conductor identification and color coding comply with NEC 200.6 and 210.5 before terminating"
  ],
  "rationale": "Exceeded sidewall pressure and jamming during an active pull indicate the conduit system and pulling method are not adequately matched to the conductor bundle. Continuing risks insulation damage that may not be visible but can cause future faults. Work must stop, the condition must be engineered out, and already-installed conductors must be inspected for damage before any further pulling proceeds.",
  "references": ["NEC 200.6", "NEC 210.5"]
}
